name: How much time off for comp with back injury?
description: 66% wages til better, then permanent pay—follow doc[1].

mainEntity.name: How much time off for comp with back injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: 66% wages til better, then permanent pay—follow doc[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Temporary total disability pays 66% wages until max medical improvement, often 3-12 months for backs.** Permanent then rated[1]. **Key factors:** Doctor release, light duty offers. **Practical guidance:** Follow restrictions, dispute unfair return pressure. Appeal cuts[1]. **Idaho/UT similar.**
